title: Health Dashboard
subtitle: Track your latest risk signals, review assessment activity, and take your next health check with a clearer workflow.

hero.welcomeWithReports: You have {{count}} assessment(s) on record. Your latest risk level is {{risk}}.
hero.welcomeEmpty: Welcome! Start your first health assessment to get personalized risk insights.

quickTip.title: Daily Health Tip
quickTip.text: Drink enough water and track symptoms regularly. Small daily checks can prevent delayed treatment.
tips: Drink enough water and track symptoms regularly. Small daily checks can prevent delayed treatment.
Try to get at least 7-8 hours of sleep. Rest is one of the most effective forms of recovery.
Even 15 minutes of walking each day can significantly improve cardiovascular health.
Practice deep breathing for 5 minutes daily - it reduces stress and improves mental clarity.

actions.newAssessmentDesc: Take a new health risk assessment

assessmentResult.title: Assessment Result
assessmentResult.sentToQueue: Sent to doctor queue. A clinical review is pending.
assessmentResult.noData: No result data found. Please complete an assessment first.
